where.if: AND (u.login_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR u.user_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%'))

mapper.select:
SELECT u.*, c.company_name, t.tenant_name, ch.channel_name, ch.channel_type FROM tb_user u LEFT JOIN tb_company c ON u.company_id = c.company_id LEFT JOIN tb_tenant t ON u.tenant_id = t.tenant_id LEFT JOIN tb_channel ch ON u.channel_id = ch.channel_id
ORDER BY u.created_at DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}

SELECT u.*, c.company_name, t.tenant_name, ch.channel_name, ch.channel_type FROM tb_user u LEFT JOIN tb_company c ON u.company_id = c.company_id LEFT JOIN tb_tenant t ON u.tenant_id = t.tenant_id LEFT JOIN tb_channel ch ON u.channel_id = ch.channel_id WHERE u.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_user (tenant_id, company_id, login_id, password_hash, user_name, mobile, email, role, channel_id, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{companyId}, #{loginId}, #{passwordHash}, #{userName}, #{mobile}, #{email}, #{userRole}, #{channelId}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_user SET role = #{userRole}, channel_id = #{channelId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE tb_user SET channel_id = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE channel_id = #{channelId} AND role = 'CHANNEL_ADMIN'
mapper.select: SELECT tenant_id as tenantId, tenant_name as tenantName, status FROM tb_tenant WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY tenant_name ASC

SELECT c.channel_id as channelId, c.channel_name as channelName, c.channel_type as channelType, c.status FROM tb_channel c JOIN tb_company co ON c.company_id = co.company_id WHERE co.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND c.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY c.channel_name ASC

SELECT company_id AS companyId, company_name AS companyName, business_no AS businessNo FROM tb_company WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND company_type = 'BUYER' AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY company_name ASC
SELECT company_id FROM tb_company WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND company_type = 'SELLER' LIMIT 1
SELECT company_id FROM tb_company WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND company_type = 'HQ' LIMIT 1
